details.prompt: Find the IXPs' names where the AS with asn 2497 is present.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:MEMBER_OF]->(ix:IXP) WITH a, COLLECT(ix.name) AS ix_names RETURN a.asn, ix_names LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Give me the names of the IXPs where AS2497 is member.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:MEMBER_OF]->(ix:IXP) RETURN COLLECT(ix.name)[0] AS IXP_Names LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Find the percentage of the population of the Country with country_code 'JP' hosted by the AS with asn 2497.
Find the percentage of Japan's population in AS2497.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[r:POPULATION]->(c:Country {country_code: 'JP'}) RETURN a.asn AS ASN, r.percent AS PopulationPercentage

details.prompt: For AS with asn 2497 find all rank values and their corresponding Ranking name for Rankings corresponding to Country with country_code 'JP'.
Find the rank and the corresponding rankings name for AS2497 in Japan.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[r:RANK]->(rn:Ranking) WHERE r.country = 'JP' RETURN r.rank AS Rank, rn.name AS RankingName LIMIT 10

details.prompt: Find all the AS nodes that have peer to peer relationship with the AS with asn 2497.
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[r:PEERS_WITH]-(b:AS)
WHERE r.rel = 0
WITH a, b
MATCH (b)-[:NAME]->(n:Name)
RETURN b.asn AS ASN, COLLECT(n.name)[0] AS AS_Name
LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Which Ases have a settlement-free peering with AS2497?
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[r:PEERS_WITH]-(b:AS)
WHERE r.rel = 0
WITH b
MATCH (b)-[:NAME]->(n:Name)
RETURN b.asn, COLLECT(n.name)[0] AS AS_Name
LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Find all distinct names for the AS with asn 2497.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:NAME]->(n:Name) RETURN DISTINCT n.name AS AS_Name LIMIT 10

details.prompt: What are the names of AS2497?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:NAME]->(n:Name) RETURN a.asn, COLLECT(n.name) AS AS_Names LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Find the label of all the tags' corresponding to the AS with asn 2497.
What are the tags for AS2497?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:CATEGORIZED]->(t:Tag) RETURN a.asn AS ASN, COLLECT(t.label) AS Tags

details.prompt: Find the label of all the tags for the Prefix with prefix 43.249.213.0/24.
What are the tags for 43.249.213.0/24?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (p:Prefix {prefix: '43.249.213.0/24'})-[:CATEGORIZED]->(t:Tag) RETURN p.prefix, COLLECT(t.label) AS tags

details.prompt: Find the rank value for AS with asn 2497 in the Ranking with name 'CAIDA ASRank'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[r:RANK]->(rn:Ranking {name: 'CAIDA ASRank'}) RETURN r.rank AS rank_value, a.asn AS ASN, rn.name AS Ranking_Name LIMIT 1

details.prompt: What is the rank for AS2497 in CAIDA ASRank?
Find the rank value for DomainName with name 'google.com' in the Ranking with name 'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (dn:DomainName {name: 'google.com'})-[r:RANK]-(rn:Ranking {name: 'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN r.rank
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:DomainName {name: 'google.com'})-[r:RANK]-(:Ranking {name:'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN r.rank

details.prompt: What is the rank for google.com in Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (dn:DomainName {name: 'google.com'})-[r:RANK]->(rn:Ranking {name: 'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN dn.name AS DomainName, r.rank AS Rank
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:DomainName {name: 'google.com'})-[r:RANK]-(:Ranking {name:'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN r.rank

details.prompt: Find the rank value for HostName with name 'www.google.com' in the Ranking with name 'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (hn:HostName {name: 'www.google.com'})-[r:RANK]->(rn:Ranking {name: 'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN r.rank AS rank_value
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:HostName {name: 'www.google.com'})-[r:RANK]-(:Ranking {name:'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN r.rank

details.prompt: What is the rank for www.google.com in Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million?
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:HostName {name: 'www.google.com'})-[r:RANK]-(:Ranking {name:'Cisco Umbrella Top 1 million'}) RETURN r.rank

details.prompt: Find distinct labels for the tags corresponding to the URL with url 'https://www.flipkart.com/'.
What are the tags for https://www.flipkart.com/?

details.difficulty: Hard technical prompt,Find the QUERIED_FROM's value for the DomainName with name 'google.com' and the Country with country_code 'US'."
details.prompt: MATCH (:DomainName {name: 'google.com'})-[q:QUERIED_FROM]->(:Country {country_code: 'US'}) RETURN q.value
What is the proportion of queries for google.com from the US?
Find the QUERIED_FROM's value for the DomainName with name 'google.com' from the AS with asn 577.
What is the proportion of queries for google.com from AS577?
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:AS {asn: 577})-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c:Country)
MATCH (dn:DomainName {name: 'google.com'})-[q:QUERIED_FROM]-(c)
RETURN q.value AS query_proportion

details.prompt: Find the distinct asn for ASes corresponding to the Name with name 'IIJ'.
What is IIJ's ASN?
Find the distinct name of AuthoritativeNameServer that manage the DomainName with name 'jp'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (dn:DomainName {name: 'jp'})-[:MANAGED_BY]->(ans:AuthoritativeNameServer) RETURN DISTINCT ans.name AS AuthoritativeNameServerName LIMIT 100

details.prompt: What are the authoritative nameservers for the .jp domain?
Find the name of the AuthoritativeNameServer that resolves to the IP with ip 203.119.1.1.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (ans:AuthoritativeNameServer)-[:RESOLVES_TO]-(ip:IP) WHERE ip.ip = '203.119.1.1' RETURN ans.name LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Which authoritative name server has the IP address 203.119.1.1?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (ip:IP {ip: '203.119.1.1'})-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(ans:AuthoritativeNameServer) WHERE ans.name IS NOT NULL RETURN ans.name AS authoritative_name_server

details.prompt: AS with asn 2907 depends on AS with asn 2497, find the hege values between them.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a1:AS {asn: 2907})-[d:DEPENDS_ON {reference_org: 'IHR'}]-(a2:AS {asn: 2497}) WITH a1, a2, COLLECT(d.hege) AS hege_values RETURN a1.asn AS asn1, a2.asn AS asn2, hege_values

details.prompt: What is the AS hegemony value between AS2907 and AS2497.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2907})-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(b:AS {asn: 2497}) RETURN d.hege AS hegemony_value LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Find the asn of the AS which has rank 1 for Japan (Country with country_code 'JP') according to the Ranking with name 'IHR country ranking: Total AS (JP)'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[r:RANK]->(rn:Ranking) WHERE rn.name = 'IHR country ranking: Total AS (JP)' AND r.rank = 1 RETURN a.asn
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[r:RANK]->(:Ranking {name: 'IHR country ranking: Total AS (JP)'})-[:COUNTRY]->(:Country {country_code: 'JP'}) RETURN a.asn ORDER BY r.hege DESC LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Which AS ranks the highest for Japan in terms of ASes?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org: 'RIPE NCC'}]-(:Country {country_code: 'JP'}) MATCH (a)-[r:RANK {reference_name: 'ihr.country_dependency'}]->(:Ranking) RETURN a.asn, r.rank ORDER BY r.rank ASC LIMIT 1
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[r:RANK]->(:Ranking {name: 'IHR country ranking: Total AS (JP)'})-[:COUNTRY]->(:Country {country_code: 'JP'}) RETURN a.asn ORDER BY r.hege DESC LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Find the prefix of Prefix nodes that originate from AS with asn 2497.
Which prefixes AS2497 is orginating in BGP?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:ORIGINATE]-(p:Prefix) RETURN a.asn AS ASN, COLLECT(p.prefix) AS Prefixes

details.prompt: Find the distinct prefix of Prefix nodes that depends on the AS with asn 2497.
Which prefixes are depending on AS2497?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:ORIGINATE]->(p:Prefix) RETURN a.asn AS ASN, collect(p.prefix) AS OriginatedPrefixes

details.prompt: Find the distinct prefix of Prefix nodes that are categorized with Tag with label 'RPKI Valid'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (p:Prefix)-[:CATEGORIZED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.label = 'RPKI Valid' RETURN DISTINCT p.prefix AS prefix

details.prompt: Find all RPKI valid prefixes?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (p:BGPPrefix)-[:CATEGORIZED]->(t:Tag) WHERE t.label = 'RPKI Valid' RETURN p.prefix, p.af, t.label LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Find the distinct prefix of Prefix related to Country with country_code 'JP'.
Give me all prefixes in Japan.
Find all AS sibling of the AS with asn 2497. Return only the asn.
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c:Country)
MATCH (sibling:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c)
WHERE sibling.asn <> 2497
RETURN sibling.asn AS sibling_asn
LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Find AS2497's sibling ASNs.
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[r:PEERS_WITH]-(a2:AS)
WHERE r.rel = 0
RETURN DISTINCT a2.asn AS sibling_asn
LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Find the distinct ip of IP nodes for which HostName with name 'google.com' resolves to.
What are the IP addresses for google.com?
Find the asn of the AS which is the target of the AtlasMeasurement with id 17635549.
What is the ASN targeted by Atlas measurement 17635549?
Find the name of the HostName node which is the target of the AtlasMeasurement with id 17635549.
What is the target hostname for Atlas measurement 17635549?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (am:AtlasMeasurement {id: 17635549})-[:TARGET]->(hn:HostName) RETURN hn.name AS target_hostname LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Find the ip of the IP node which is the target of AtlasMeasurement with id 17635549.
What is the target IP address for Atlas measurement 17635549?
Find the id of the OpaqueID corresponding to Prefix with prefix 102.209.224.0/21. Return only the OpaqueID's id.
What is the opaque id for 102.209.224.0/21?
Find all the distinct Tag's labels that categorize the AS with asn 2497.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:CATEGORIZED]-(t:Tag) RETURN DISTINCT t.label AS TagLabel LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Find all tags for AS2497.
From the Ranking with name 'Tranco top 1M' find the name of the DomainName that is ranked first.
What is the first domain name in 'Tranco top 1M'?
Find population Estimate value for Country Japan with country_code 'JP'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {country_code: 'JP'}) RETURN c.name AS CountryName, null AS PopulationEstimate

details.prompt: What is Japan's estimated population?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (c:Country {country_code: 'JP'}) RETURN c.name AS CountryName, NULL AS EstimatedPopulation

details.prompt: Find the number of AS in Country with country_code 'CN' and 'HK'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c:Country) WHERE c.country_code IN ['CN', 'HK'] RETURN c.country_code, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS NumberOfASes
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY]-(cc:Country) WHERE cc.country_code = 'CN' OR cc.country_code = 'HK' WITH cc.country_code AS code, count(DISTINCT a) AS c RETURN c

details.prompt: What is the number of ASes registered in China and Hong Kong?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c:Country) WHERE c.country_code IN ['CN', 'HK'] WITH c.country_code AS country, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS NumberOfASes RETURN country, NumberOfASes
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY]-(cc:Country) WHERE cc.country_code = 'CN' OR cc.country_code = 'HK' WITH cc.country_code AS code, count(DISTINCT a) AS c RETURN c

details.prompt: Find the total number of  AS in Country with country_code 'CN' that also orignate Prefixes.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c:Country {country_code:'CN'}) MATCH (a)-[:ORIGINATE]-(:Prefix) RETURN count(DISTINCT a) AS total_as_originating_prefixes
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:Country {country_code: 'CN'})-[:COUNTRY]-(as:AS)-[:ORIGINATE]-(:Prefix) RETURN count(DISTINCT as) AS totalASWithPrefix

details.prompt: What is the number of Chinese ASes that originate prefixes in BGP?
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:Country {country_code: 'CN'})-[:COUNTRY]-(as:AS)-[:ORIGINATE]-(:Prefix) RETURN count(DISTINCT as) AS totalASWithPrefix

details.prompt: Find all Facilities where AS with asn 4134 and AS with asn 23764 are located in.
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a1:AS {asn: 4134})-[:LOCATED_IN]->(f:Facility)<-[:LOCATED_IN]-(a2:AS {asn: 23764})
RETURN f.name AS FacilityName, COLLECT(a1.asn) AS ASNs1, COLLECT(a2.asn) AS ASNs2
LIMIT 10
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(fac:Facility)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(b:AS) WHERE a.asn = 4134 AND b.asn = 23764 RETURN fac

details.prompt: Find the common facilities between AS4134 and AS23764.
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a1:AS {asn: 4134})-[:LOCATED_IN]->(f:Facility)
MATCH (a2:AS {asn: 23764})-[:LOCATED_IN]->(f)
RETURN DISTINCT f.name AS common_facility_name, f.id AS common_facility_id
LIMIT 100
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(fac:Facility)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(b:AS) WHERE a.asn = 4134 AND b.asn = 23764 RETURN fac

details.prompt: Find the distinct country_code of Country where for Facilities where both AS with asn 4134 and AS with asn 23764 are located.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(fac:Facility)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(b:AS) WHERE a.asn = 4134 AND b.asn = 23764 MATCH (fac)-[:COUNTRY]-(c:Country) RETURN DISTINCT c.country_code

details.prompt: Find the country codes for all the common facilities between AS4134 and AS23764.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (f:Facility) WHERE f.name = 'Equinix FR4 - Frankfurt, West' OR f.name = 'Digital Realty Frankfurt FRA1-16' OR f.name = 'Equinix LD8 - London, Docklands' MATCH (f)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) RETURN DISTINCT c.country_code AS CountryCode
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(fac:Facility)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(b:AS) WHERE a.asn = 4134 AND b.asn = 23764 MATCH (fac)-[:COUNTRY]-(c:Country) RETURN DISTINCT c.country_code

details.prompt: Find all ASes corresponding to the OpaqueID of AS with asn 4134 and AS with asn 23764. Then find the Country for facilities where all these ASes are. Return the distinct country_code and the corresponding list of ASes.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:ASSIGNED]-(oid:OpaqueID) WHERE a.asn IN [4134, 23764] WITH oid MATCH (oid)--(other:AS)--(fac:Facility)--(cc:Country) RETURN DISTINCT cc.country_code, collect(DISTINCT other.asn)

details.prompt: Find the country codes of facilities where for all ASes that correspond to the OpaqueID's of AS4134 and AS23764. Return the distinct country_code and the corresponding list of ASes.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:ASSIGNED]-(oid:OpaqueID) WHERE a.asn IN [4134, 23764] WITH oid MATCH (oid)--(other:AS)--(fac:Facility)--(cc:Country) RETURN DISTINCT cc.country_code, collect(DISTINCT other.asn)

details.prompt: Find all nodes that have relationships to the Prefix with prefix 8.8.8.0/24. Do not take into account the direction of the relationships.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (p:Prefix {prefix: '8.8.8.0/24'})-- (related_node) WITH DISTINCT p, related_node RETURN p, related_node LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Return everything that is related with 8.8.8.0/24.
Find the Country connected (reference_name 'nro.delegated_stats') with AS with asn 2497.
In which country is AS2497 registered in the delegated stats?
Find the IXP where AS with asn 2497 is member of and then the Country corresponding to these IXP.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:MEMBER_OF]->(ix:IXP)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country) RETURN a.asn, ix.name AS IXP_Name, c.name AS Country_Name LIMIT 10

details.prompt: Which IXPs and corresponding countries is AS2497 member of?
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS {asn: 2497})-[:MEMBER_OF]-(ix:IXP)-[:COUNTRY]-(c:Country) WITH DISTINCT ix, c, a.asn AS asn RETURN asn, ix.name AS IXP_Name, c.name AS Country_Name LIMIT 100

details.prompt: Find all the DomainName nodes ranked in top 50000 that resolves to an IP that is part of a prefix originated by the AS with asn 2497.
Retrieve the top 50000 domain names associated with the IP addresses announce by AS2497.

details.difficulty: Medium technical prompt,Find all the Facility nodes located in Country with country_code 'CN' or 'HK' and count the number of ASes located in these facilities. Return the facility name and the number of ASes."
details.prompt: MATCH (c:Country)--(f:Facility)--(a:AS) WHERE c.country_code = 'CN' OR c.country_code = 'HK' RETURN f.name, count(DISTINCT a) AS nb_as ORDER BY nb_as DESC
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (c:Country) WHERE c.country_code = 'CN' OR c.country_code = 'HK' MATCH (f:Facility)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c) RETURN f.name, count(DISTINCT a) AS nb_as ORDER BY nb_as DESC

details.prompt: Count the number of ASes for each facility in China and Hong Kong.
details.generated_cypher:
MATCH (a:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(f:Facility)-[:COUNTRY]->(c:Country)
WHERE c.country_code IN ['CN', 'HK']
RETURN f.name AS FacilityName, COUNT(DISTINCT a) AS AS_Count
ORDER BY AS_Count DESC
LIMIT 100
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (c:Country)--(f:Facility)--(a:AS) WHERE c.country_code = 'CN' OR c.country_code = 'HK' RETURN f.name, count(DISTINCT a) AS nb_as ORDER BY nb_as DESC

details.prompt: Find ASes for which the Country given by NRO has country_code 'CN' and return all the Facility nodes where these ASes are located in.
Find all the facilities where Chinese ASes are.
Find all the AS nodes that are located in Facility nodes linked to Country nodes with country_code 'CN' or 'HK'.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (net:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(fac:Facility)--(fac_country:Country) WHERE fac_country.country_code = 'HK' OR fac_country.country_code = 'CN' RETURN net

details.prompt: Retrieve all the ASes that are located in facilities in China or Hong Kong.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (net:AS)-[:LOCATED_IN]-(fac:Facility)--(fac_country:Country) WHERE fac_country.country_code = 'HK' OR fac_country.country_code = 'CN' RETURN net

details.prompt: Find the country_code for the Prefix nodes that are originated by AS nodes located in Country with country_code 'CN'.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org: 'NRO'}]-(c:Country {country_code: 'CN'}) MATCH (a)-[:ORIGINATE]-(p:Prefix) RETURN DISTINCT c.country_code, p.prefix

details.prompt: Get the country code of prefixes announced by Chinese ASes.
details.generated_cypher: MATCH (a:AS)-[:COUNTRY {reference_org:'NRO'}]-(c:Country {country_code:'CN'}) MATCH (a)-[:ORIGINATE]-(p:Prefix) RETURN DISTINCT c.country_code, p.prefix

details.prompt: Find the country_code of Country nodes related to the Prefix nodes that originated from AS nodes located in Country with country_code 'HK'.
Get the country code of prefixes announced by ASes of Hong Kong.
Find the asn of the AS with the largest number of Prefix nodes located in Country with country_code 'CN' or 'HK'.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (pfx_country:Country)-[:COUNTRY]-(pfx:Prefix)-[:ORIGINATE]-(net:AS) WHERE pfx_country.country_code = 'HK' OR pfx_country.country_code = 'CN' WITH net, COUNT(distinct pfx) as nb_pfx RETURN net.asn ORDER BY nb_pfx DESC LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Get the As with the largest number of prefixes in China or Hong Kong.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (pfx_country:Country)-[:COUNTRY]-(pfx:Prefix)-[:ORIGINATE]-(net:AS) WHERE pfx_country.country_code = 'HK' OR pfx_country.country_code = 'CN' WITH net, COUNT(distinct pfx) as nb_pfx RETURN net.asn ORDER BY nb_pfx DESC LIMIT 1

details.prompt: Find all the corresponding IP nodes, Prefix nodes and AS nodes for all the HostName nodes which name ends with '.cn' and that are ranked below 10000.
details.canonical_cypher: MATCH (:Ranking)-[r:RANK]-(dn:HostName)--(ip:IP)--(pfx:Prefix)-[:ORIGINATE]-(net:AS) WHERE dn.name ENDS WITH '.cn' AND r.rank<10000 RETURN ip, pfx, net
